title: Event-sourced PBIs in backlog.jsonl: verbs, fold, generated-view renderer
action: Per CONTEXT v2 D1-D4 (read docs/history/backlog-unification/CONTEXT.md first — it is v2, event-sourced, NOT per-item markdown). Edit BOTH twins of each lib identically (test_lib_mirror parity). In backlog.mjs: PBI event records in .bee/backlog.jsonl — {ts, kind:'pbi', event:'add'|'status'|'amend', id, title?, cos?, status?, feature?}; foldPbis(root) derives current items (last-event-wins per field; duplicate add for an existing id refused; enum proposed|in-flight|parked|done|declined). Verbs (bee.mjs + command-registry, both twins): backlog pbi add [--id P<n> migration-only] (generates p-<8hex> via crypto, prints id), backlog pbi status --id --to <enum> [--feature <slug>], backlog pbi amend --id [--title] [--cos], backlog pbi list [--status] [--json], backlog render --write|--check (generated docs/backlog.md — copy the KNOWLEDGE_INDEX_HEADER idiom from knowledge.mjs:1100 with command strings swapped to 'bee backlog render'; proposed/in-flight/parked full rows, done/declined one-line links; deterministic, path/id-sorted, LF, no timestamps). RETIRE backlog rank --write (verb refuses with a message naming render; registry entry updated) — render owns the view. counts/badges/featureBacklogRank re-derive from foldPbis WHEN any kind:pbi event exists, else legacy table parse (host-repo compat). In feedback.mjs (both twins): collectFeedback explicitly skips kind:'pbi' lines (never unknown_type). Extend test_backlog_capture.mjs: fold semantics (add/status/amend, last-wins, dup-add refusal), generated-id shape + no-collision-on-concurrent-adds (two adds, distinct ids), enum refusals incl parked/declined counting, --feature stamp on status flip, render determinism + --check drift + short-view collapse, rank retirement refusal, digest skip of pbi lines, legacy fallback. Red-first evidence. Regen manifest + ledger + impact registry.

truths: ids crypto-generated, collision-free — no read-then-increment anywhere
render deterministic w/ generated header; --check catches drift; done/declined collapse to links
rank --write retired; digest skips kind:pbi; legacy fallback intact

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_backlog_capture.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
